title: HIV ALLIANCE - 211info
text: HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY HIV ALLIANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health evaluations, individual counseling services, STI testing and primary care services, specializing in providing culturally sensitive services to LGBTQ+ and HIV-positive communities 1195 City View Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV and their families, friends, and loved ones Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 342-5088 Main phone (866) 470-3419 Hotline Main phone (541) 342-5088 Toll-free (866) 470-3419 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton, Clatsop, Coos, Curry, Douglas, Jackson, Josephine, Klamath, Lake, Lane, Lincoln, Linn, Marion, and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: AIDS/HIV Clinics General Recreational Activities/Sports * AIDS/HIV Issues Specialized Information and Referral * AIDS/HIV Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEPATITIS C CASE MANAGEMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIV+ CARE COORDINATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ALLIANCE FOR COMMUNITY WELLNESS MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY
